extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value (around 0.2–0.3) and then decreases toward near-zero during the first third of the time.
R2: Around the middle of the series it rises sharply from near-zero to a clear peak above roughly 0.5.
R3: After the peak it stays high for a short interval and then decreases gradually, ending at a mid-range value (around 0.2–0.5), not near-zero.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very low (near-zero) and remains close to zero during the first third of the time.
R2: Around the middle it rises sharply from near-zero to a peak above roughly 0.5–0.6.
R3: After the peak it decreases strongly and almost monotonically, ending again very close to zero.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The values in the very beginning (around time steps 0–2) start clearly above zero (roughly ≥ 0.18–0.25).
R2: After the mid-peak (around time steps 12–16) the series stays relatively high for several steps, forming a broad, plateau-like high region before declining.
R3: The final decline (last ~5 time steps) ends at a moderate level (final value typically between about 0.15 and 0.35), not near zero.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The values in the very beginning (around time steps 0–2) start very close to zero (roughly ≤ 0.07–0.10).
R2: After the mid-peak (around time steps 12–16) the series declines more steeply, without a long, flat high plateau.
R3: The final decline (last ~5 time steps) ends very low, with the final value close to zero (typically ≤ 0.15).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value and decreases quickly, reaching a low plateau near 0 around time 4–7.  
R2: From this low plateau, it rises steeply from about time 8 to a main peak between times 12–14.  
R3: After the main peak, it remains relatively high with small oscillations and then declines gradually towards the end without dropping sharply to near 0.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value and stays close to 0 for longer, with only a slow, shallow increase up to about time 6–7.  
R2: From this very low region, it then rises steeply to a main peak slightly later, around times 13–16.  
R3: After the main peak, it falls more abruptly and more deeply, ending close to 0 with a strong downward slope in the final segment.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value and decreases until roughly time 5, staying clearly above zero (no long flat near-zero segment at the beginning).  
R2: It then rises steeply to a main peak around times 12–14.  
R3: After the peak it stays relatively high and forms one or two secondary bumps, then decreases moderately but not all the way back to (near) zero by the final time.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins very close to zero and remains near zero (flat/low) up to about time 6–7.  
R2: It then rises steeply to a main peak around times 12–16.  
R3: After the peak it decreases strongly and ends at a low value close to zero.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value (around 0.2–0.35) and decreases steadily to near 0 by about one quarter of the length.  
R2: From roughly one quarter to one half of the length, the series rises steeply from near 0 to a peak below or around 0.7.  
R3: After the main peak, the series stays in a mid-to-high range (about 0.4–0.7) for a while, then descends gradually, ending in a mid-range value (around 0.15–0.35), not near 0.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (near 0) and stays very low and flat for about one quarter of the length.  
R2: From roughly one quarter to one half of the length, the series rises steeply from near 0 to a relatively high peak (around 0.6–0.85).  
R3: After the main peak, the series declines more strongly, ending at a value close to 0 (lower than about 0.15).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value (around 0.2–0.35) and decreases quickly to a low plateau (near 0–0.1) by about time 5.  
R2: From this low plateau, it rises steeply to a main peak between times 11 and 14, reaching roughly 0.6–0.9.  
R3: After the main peak, it stays relatively high and flat or with small bumps until about time 18, then decreases gradually (not too sharply) toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (near 0–0.1) and stays low and flat until about time 6–7.  
R2: From this low region, it rises steeply to a main peak slightly later, around times 13–17, reaching roughly 0.6–0.9.  
R3: After the peak, it drops sharply and more continuously from about time 18 onward, ending at a clearly low value (near 0–0.2) with no extended high plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value (around 0.2–0.3) and decreases to a low plateau near zero within the first 5–7 time steps.  
R2: From roughly time 7 to 13 the series rises steeply from near zero to a high peak (around 0.6–0.9).  
R3: After peaking, the series stays relatively high and flat for several time steps, then decreases gradually rather than sharply in the final third of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (close to 0) and remains low and flat for longer (about the first 7–9 time steps).  
R2: From roughly time 9 to 13 the series rises steeply from near zero to a high peak (around 0.6–0.8), similar in height to Class 0.  
R3: After peaking, the series drops more sharply and more continuously in the last third, without a long high plateau and often ending near its minimum.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value and clearly decreases during the first 3–5 time steps.
R2: After a low, nearly flat region around early–mid segment, the series rises steeply to its main peak between time steps ~11–17.
R3: After the main peak, the series stays relatively high for several steps and then decreases gradually, without a sharp final drop.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts near zero and stays very low and flat during the first 5–7 time steps.
R2: From this flat low region, the series rises sharply to its main peak around time steps ~12–18.
R3: After the main peak, the series declines quickly and almost monotonically toward near-zero by the final time steps.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first third of the series, values start moderately high (above ~0.15) and steadily decrease toward near-zero.  
R2: In the middle third, values rise sharply from near-zero to a peak below ~0.9.  
R3: In the last third, values remain relatively high and slowly decline (no rapid drop back to near-zero).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first third of the series, values start low (below ~0.1) and stay near-zero with only a mild increase.  
R2: In the middle third, values rise sharply from near-zero to a peak at or above ~0.8.  
R3: In the last third, values drop rapidly and almost monotonically from the peak down to near-zero.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the early segment (indices 0–7), values start moderately high and decrease to a clear minimum, typically above 0 but not exactly flat (a gentle downward slope then leveling).
R2: Around the middle (indices 10–16), values rise sharply to a single main peak and then remain high but somewhat rounded/plateaued rather than forming narrow spikes.
R3: In the late segment (indices 18–24), values decrease from this high middle level but stay at a moderate level (do not fall close to zero), giving the overall series a “rise-and-soft-fall” shape.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the early segment (indices 0–7), values remain very low and nearly flat, close to zero with only tiny fluctuations.
R2: Around the middle (indices 10–16), values rise sharply from this low baseline to a high peak, forming a steep “wall” coming from near zero.
R3: In the late segment (indices 18–24), values drop steeply from the peak back toward very low levels near zero, giving the overall series a “valley-to-peak-to-valley” shape.
